title: Reworked Golden Tools
description: Golden tools break multiple blocks at once. (Pickaxes mine 3x3, axes fell entire trees, and more)
body:
This vanilla-friendly and multiplayer-friendly data pack improves golden pickaxes, shovels, axes, and hoes and compatible with all Vanilla enchantments. They work on multiple blocks at the same time but mine much slower. The changes to golden tools keep the progression fresh but offering temporary but powerful alternatives during the mid to late game.

Golden pickaxes and shovels mine in 3x3 area. 

Axes fell entire trees and once and accelerate the decay of leaves.

Hoes till farmland and harvest fully grown crops in 3x3 area.

They are fully compatable with vanilla enchantments.

Crouching causes the tools to revert to their vanilla behavior so you can break one block at a time.

A config menu can be opened with `/function m_golden_tools:config` to disable/enable the datapack, configure the maximum logs broken by the axe (default to 160), and change the speed of leaf decay after using the axe (default to ~23x faster)
